reference: I started out with eighteen days of diarrhea followed by abdominal pains that made me nauseous for sixteen days, along with lower back pain and pain in between my shoulders. I am now experiencing low body temperatures that usually occur in the evening (ninety-six point nine°F in the morning). My body temperature ranges between ninety-seven°F and ninety-eight°F. I have been getting light-headed when looking up and have noticed disorientation and balance issues. Can you help?
text: I started out with eighteen days of diarrhea, followed by abdominal pains that made me nauseous for sixteen days, along with lower back pain and pain in between my shoulders. I am now experiencing low body temperatures, which occur in the evening—ninety-six point nine Fahrenheit in the morning. My body temperature ranges between ninety-seven to Fahrenheit and ninety-eight Fahrenheit. I have been getting light-headed when looking up and have noticed disorientation and balance issues. Can you help?
